heading: Planting flexibility
label: 8756 Planting flexibility
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Effective DateEnactment of this section and repeal of by effective , the date of enactment of , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246section 8701 of this titleMay 22, 2008

children.heading: Permitted crops
children.label: a Permitted crops
children.text: Subject to subsection (b), any commodity or crop may be planted on the base acres for peanuts on a farm.

children.heading: General limitation
children.label: 1 General limitation
children.text: The planting of an agricultural commodity specified in paragraph (3) shall be prohibited on base acres for peanuts unless the commodity, if planted, is destroyed before harvest.

children.heading: Treatment of trees and other perennials
children.label: 2 Treatment of trees and other perennials
children.text: The planting of an agricultural commodity specified in paragraph (3) that is produced on a tree or other perennial plant shall be prohibited on base acres for peanuts.

children.label: B
children.text: Vegetables (other than mung beans and pulse crops).

in any region in which there is a history of double-cropping of peanuts with agricultural commodities specified in subsection (b)(3), as determined by the Secretary, in which case the double-cropping shall be permitted;

on a farm that the Secretary determines has a history of planting agricultural commodities specified in subsection (b)(3) on the base acres for peanuts, except that direct payments and counter-cyclical payments shall be reduced by an acre for each acre planted to such an agricultural commodity; or

children.label: A
children.text: the quantity planted may not exceed the average annual planting history of such agricultural commodity by the producers on the farm in the 1991 through 1995 or 1998 through 2001 crop years (excluding any crop year in which no plantings were made), as determined by the Secretary; and

children.label: B
children.text: direct payments and counter-cyclical payments shall be reduced by an acre for each acre planted to such agricultural commodity.
